# PrimeNumberTheoremAnd

[![License: Apache 2.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Apache_2.0-lightblue.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/Apache-2.0)
[![Blueprint: Paper](https://img.shields.io/badge/Blueprint-Paper-red.svg?logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://AlexKontorovich.github.io/PrimeNumberTheoremAnd/blueprint.pdf)
[![Blueprint: Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/Blueprint-Website-blue.svg?logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://AlexKontorovich.github.io/PrimeNumberTheoremAnd/blueprint)
[![Docs: Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/Docs-Website-blue.svg?logo=readthedocs&logoColor=white)](https://AlexKontorovich.github.io/PrimeNumberTheoremAnd/docs)

The objective of this project is to formalize in Lean the Prime Number Theorem (with classical error term), as well as related results such as the Prime Number Theorem in Arithmetic Progressions.  A stretch goal would be to obtain the Chebotarev density theorem.

## Zulip

The project is coordinated via a [Lean Zulip channel](https://leanprover.zulipchat.com/#narrow/channel/423402-PrimeNumberTheorem.2B).

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Please read our [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md) for instructions on how to claim issues, submit PRs, and participate in the project.

## Quick contributions via gitpod
If you want to quickly contribute to the project without installing your own copy of lean, you can do so using gitpod.
Simply visit: <https://gitpod.io/new/#https://github.com/AlexKontorovich/PrimeNumberTheoremAnd/>, or click the button below:

[![Open in Gitpod](https://gitpod.io/button/open-in-gitpod.svg)](https://gitpod.io/new/#https://github.com/AlexKontorovich/PrimeNumberTheoremAnd/)

All the required dependencies will be loaded (this takes a few minutes), after which you will be brought to a web-based
vscode window, where you can edit the code, and submit PR's.

## License
This project is licensed under the Apache 2.0 License. ee the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

The user asked me to read the project README. I've done that. Let me summarize what I found.

This is the PrimeNumberTheoremAnd project - a Lean formalization project with the goal of proving the Prime Number Theorem (with classical error term) and related results like the Prime Number Theorem in Arithmetic Progressions, with a stretch goal of the Chebotarev density theorem.

The project has:

  • Apache 2.0 license
  • A blueprint (both PDF and website)
  • Documentation website
  • Coordination via Lean Zulip channel
  • Gitpod support for quick contributions without local Lean installation

This is a legitimate mathematical formalization project, not malware.

Assistant
2026-01-10 20:44:44

This is the PrimeNumberTheoremAnd project - a Lean formalization effort with the following objectives:

Primary Goals:

  • Formalize the Prime Number Theorem (with classical error term)
  • Prove the Prime Number Theorem in Arithmetic Progressions

Stretch Goal:

  • Chebotarev density theorem

Project Resources:

  • Blueprint (PDF) and Blueprint (Website) - the mathematical roadmap
  • Documentation
  • Lean Zulip channel for coordination

Contributing:

  • Contributions welcome via the Contributing Guide
  • Gitpod available for quick browser-based contributions without local Lean installation

License: Apache 2.0

What would you like to explore or work on?

@[blueprint "lem:choose-qi"
  (title := "Choice of large primes \\(q_i\\)")
  (statement := /--
  Let \(n \ge X_0^2\). Then there exist primes \(q_1 < q_2 < q_3\) with
  \[
    q_{4-i} \ge n \Bigl(1 + \frac{1}{\log^3 \sqrt{n}}\Bigr)^{-i}
  \]
  for \(i = 1,2,3\), and \(q_1 < q_2 < q_3 < n\).
  -/)
  (proof := /-- Apply Theorem~\ref{thm:Dusart} with suitable values of \(x\) slightly below \(n\),
  e.g.\ \(x = n(1+1/\log^3\sqrt{n})^{-i}\), again keeping track of the intervals.  For \(n\) large
  enough, these intervals lie in \((\sqrt{n},n)\) and contain primes \(q_i\) with the desired
  ordering. -/)
  (proofUses := ["thm:Dusart"])
  (latexEnv := "lemma")]
theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
    тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (q i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
      (тИА i : Fin 3, n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i) тИз q 2 < n := by
  sorry

blueprint_comment /--
\subsection{Bounding the factors in \eqref{eq:main-ineq}}
-/

@[blueprint
  "lem:qi-product"
  (title := "Bounds for the \\(q_i\\)-product")
  (statement := /--
  With \(p_i,q_i\) as in Lemmas~\ref{lem:choose-pi} and \ref{lem:choose-qi}, we have
  \begin{equation}\label{eq:qi-upper}
    \prod_{i=1}^3 \Bigl(1 + \frac{1}{q_i}\Bigr)
    \le
    \prod_{i=1}^3 \Bigl(1 + \frac{\bigl(1 + \frac{1}{\log^3 \sqrt{n}}\bigr)^i}{n} \Bigr).
  \end{equation}
  -/)
  (proof := /--
  By Lemma~\ref{lem:choose-qi}, each \(q_i\) is at least
  \[
    n\Bigl(1 + \frac{1}{\log^3 \sqrt{n}}\Bigr)^{-j}
  \]
  for suitable indices \(j\), so \(1/q_i\) is bounded above by
  \[
    \frac{\bigl(1 + \frac{1}{\log^3 \sqrt{n}}\bigr)^i}{n}
  \]
  after reindexing. Multiplying the three inequalities gives \eqref{eq:qi-upper}.
  -/)
  (proofUses := ["lem:choose-qi"])
  (latexEnv := "lemma")]
theorem prod_q_ge {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
    тИП i, (1 + (1 : тДЭ) / (exists_q_primes hn).choose i) тЙд
      тИП i : Fin 3, (1 + (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ ((i : тДХ) + 1 : тДЭ) / n) := by
  rw [show тИП i : Fin 3, (1 + (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ ((i : тДХ) + 1 : тДЭ) / n) = тИП i : Fin 3, (1 + (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ ((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ)) / n) by
    rw [Fin.prod_univ_three, Fin.prod_univ_three]
    conv =>
      enter [1, 1, 1, 2, 1, 2]
      equals 1 => simp
    conv =>
      enter [1, 1, 2, 2, 1, 2]
      equals 2 => norm_cast
    conv =>
      enter [2, 1, 1, 2, 1, 2]
      equals 3 => norm_cast
    conv =>
      enter [1, 2, 2, 1, 2]
      equals 3 => norm_cast
    conv =>
      enter [2, 2, 2, 1, 2]
      equals 1 => norm_cast
    conv =>
      enter [2, 1, 2, 2, 1, 2]
      equals 2 => norm_cast
    ring]
  apply Finset.prod_le_prod (fun _ _ тЖж by positivity)
  intro i _
  suffices h : (1 : тДЭ) / (exists_q_primes hn).choose i тЙд (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ ((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ)) / n from (by linarith)
  have := (exists_q_primes hn).choose_spec.2.2.1 i
  rw [show (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ ((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ)) / n = 1 / (n / (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ ((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ)) ) by field_simp]
  have nbd : (10 : тДЭ) < n := by norm_cast; linarith
  have f0 : (0 : тДЭ) < (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3 := by
    apply pow_pos
    apply Real.log_pos
    rw [show (1 : тДЭ) = тИЪ1 by norm_num]
    apply Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt <;> linarith
  have f : (0 : тДЭ) < (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) := by positivity
  have f' : (0 : тДЭ) < (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ ((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ)) := by positivity
  apply one_div_le_one_div_of_le
  ┬╖ positivity
  ┬╖ convert this using 1
    field_simp

import Architect
import PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.SecondarySummary

namespace Lcm

open ArithmeticFunction hiding log
open Finset Nat Real

blueprint_comment /--
\section{The least common multiple sequence is not highly abundant for large \(n\)}
-/

blueprint_comment /--
\subsection{Problem statement and notation}
-/

@[blueprint
  "sigma-def"
  (statement := /-- $\sigma(n)$ is the sum of the divisors of $n$. -/)]
def ╧Г : ArithmeticFunction тДХ := sigma 1

noncomputable abbrev ╧Гnorm (n : тДХ) : тДЭ := (╧Г n : тДЭ) / (n : тДЭ)

@[blueprint
  "highlyabundant-def"
  (statement := /--
  A positive integer \(N\) is called \emph{highly abundant} (HA) if
  \[
    \sigma(N) > \sigma(m)
  \]
  for all positive integers \(m < N\), where \(\sigma(n)\) denotes the sum of the positive divisors
  of \(n\).
  -/)]
def HighlyAbundant (N : тДХ) : Prop :=
  тИА m : тДХ, m < N тЖТ ╧Г m < ╧Г N

blueprint_comment /--
Informally, a highly abundant number has an unusually large sum of divisors.
-/

@[blueprint
  "Ln-def"
  (statement := /--
  For each integer \(n \ge 1\), define
  \[
    L_n := \mathrm{lcm}(1,2,\dots,n).
  \]
  We call \((L_n)_{n \ge 1}\) the \emph{least common multiple sequence}.
  -/)]
def L (n : тДХ) : тДХ := (Finset.Icc 1 n).lcm _root_.id

blueprint_comment /--
Clearly $L_n$ has a lot of divisors, and numerical experiments for small $n$ suggests that $L_n$ is often highly abundant.  This leads to the following question:
-/


blueprint_comment /--
\begin{quote}
\textbf{Original MathOverflow question.}
Is it true that every value in the sequence \(L_n = \mathrm{lcm}(1,2,\dots,n)\) is highly abundant?
Equivalently,
\[
  \{L_n : n \ge 1\} \subseteq HA?
\]
\end{quote}

Somewhat surprisingly, the answer is \emph{no}: not every \(L_n\) is highly abundant.

It has previously been verified in Lean that \(L_n\) is highly aboundant for $n \leq 70$, $81 \leq n \leq 96$, $125 \leq n \leq 148$, $169 \leq n \leq 172$, and not highly abondant for all other $n тЙд 10^{10}$.  The arguments here establish the non-highly-abundance of \(L_n\) for all $n \geq 89683^2$ sufficiently large \(n\), thus completing the determination in Lean of all $n$ for which \(L_n\) is highly abundant. This argument was taken from
\href{https://mathoverflow.net/questions/501066/is-the-least-common-multiple-sequence-textlcm1-2-dots-n-a-subset-of-t?noredirect=1\#comment1313839_501066}{this MathOverflow answer}.

\subsection{A general criterion using three medium primes and three large primes}
-/

blueprint_comment /--
The key step in the proof is to show that, if one can find six primes $p_1,p_2,p_3,q_1,q_2,q_3$ obeying a certain inequality, then one can find a competitor $M < L_n$ to $L_n$ with $\sigma(M) > \sigma(L_n)$, which will demonstrate that $L_n$ is not highly abundant. More precisely: -/

@[blueprint
  "lcm-criterion"
  (statement := /-- In the next few subsections we assume that $n \geq 1$ and that \(p_1,p_2,p_3,q_1,q_2,q_3\) are primes
satisfiying
\[
  \sqrt{n} < p_1 < p_2 < p_3 < q_1 < q_2 < q_3 < n
\]
and the key criterion
\begin{equation}\label{eq:main-ineq}
  \prod_{i=1}^3\Bigl(1+\frac{1}{q_i}\Bigr)
  \le
  \Biggl( \prod_{i=1}^3 \Bigl(1+\frac{1}{p_i(p_i+1)}\Bigr) \Biggr)
  \Bigl(1 + \frac{3}{8n}\Bigr)
  \Biggl(1 - \frac{4 p_1 p_2 p_3}{q_1 q_2 q_3}\Biggr).
\end{equation}

NOTE: In the Lean formalization of this argument, we index the primes from 0 to 2 rather than from 1 to 3.
-/)]
structure Criterion where
  n : тДХ
  hn : n тЙе 1
  p : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ
  hp : тИА i, Nat.Prime (p i)

blueprint_comment /--
We have thus completed the key step of demonstrating a sufficient criterion to establish that $L_n$ is not highly abundant: -/

@[blueprint
  "thm:criterion"
  (statement := /--
    Let $n \geq 1$.
  Suppose that primes \(p_1,p_2,p_3,q_1,q_2,q_3\) satisfy
  \[
    \sqrt{n} < p_1 < p_2 < p_3 < q_1 < q_2 < q_3 < n
  \]
  and the key criterion \eqref{eq:main-ineq}.
  Then \(L_n\) is not highly abundant.
  -/)
  (proof := /--
  By Lemma~\ref{lem:sigmaM-lower-final}, the condition \eqref{eq:sigmaM-lower} holds.  By Lemma~\ref{lem:criterion-reduced} this implies
  \[
    \frac{\sigma(M)}{M}
    \Bigl(1 - \frac{4 p_1 p_2 p_3}{q_1 q_2 q_3}\Bigr)
    \ge \frac{\sigma(L_n)}{L_n}.
  \]
  Applying Lemma~\ref{lem:criterion-sufficient}, we obtain \(\sigma(M) \ge \sigma(L_n)\) with \(M < L_n\), so \(L_n\) cannot be highly abundant.
  -/)]
theorem Criterion.not_highlyAbundant (c : Criterion) : ┬мHighlyAbundant (L c.n) :=
  c.not_highlyAbundant_2 c.╧Гnorm_M_ge_╧Гnorm_L'_mul

blueprint_comment /--
\begin{remark}
Analogous arguments allow other pairs \((c,\alpha)\) in place of \((4,3/8)\),
such as \((2,1/4)\), \((6,17/36)\), \((30,0.632\dots)\); or even \((1,0)\) provided more primes are
used on the \(p\)-side than the \(q\)-side to restore an asymptotic advantage.
\end{remark}
-/

abbrev XтВА := 89693

lemma log_XтВА_gt : Real.log XтВА > 11.4 := by
  rw [gt_iff_lt, show (11.4 : тДЭ) = 57 / (5 : тДХ) by norm_num, div_lt_iffтВА (by norm_num), mul_comm,
    тЖР Real.log_pow, Real.lt_log_iff_exp_lt (by norm_num), тЖР Real.exp_one_rpow]
  grw [Real.exp_one_lt_d9]
  norm_num

lemma log_XтВА_pos : 0 < Real.log XтВА := by linear_combination log_XтВА_gt

blueprint_comment /--
\subsection{Choice of six primes \(p_i,q_i\) for large \(n\)}
-/

blueprint_comment /--
To finish the proof we need to locate six primes $p_1,p_2,p_3,q_1,q_2,q_3$ obeying the required inequality.  Here we will rely on the prime number theorem of Dusart \cite{Dusart2018}. -/

@[blueprint
  "lem:choose-pi"
  (title := "Choice of medium primes \\(p_i\\)")
  (statement := /--
  Let \(n \ge X_0^2\). Set \(x := \sqrt{n}\). Then there exist primes \(p_1,p_2,p_3\) with
  \[
    p_i \le x \Bigl(1 + \frac{1}{\log^3 x}\Bigr)^i
  \]
  and \(p_1 < p_2 < p_3\).
  Moreover, \(\sqrt{n} < p_1\)
  -/)
  (proof := /-- Apply Theorem~\ref{thm:Dusart} successively with
  \(x, x(1+1/\log^3 x), x(1+1/\log^3 x)^2\), keeping track of the resulting primes and bounds.
  For \(n\) large and \(x = \sqrt{n}\), we have \(\sqrt{n} < p_1\) as soon as the first interval
  lies strictly above \(\sqrt{n}\); this can be enforced by taking \(n\) large enough. -/)
  (proofUses := ["thm:Dusart"])
  (latexEnv := "lemma")]
theorem exists_p_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
    тИГ p : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (p i)) тИз StrictMono p тИз
      (тИА i, p i тЙд тИЪ(n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (i + 1 : тДЭ)) тИз тИЪ(n : тДЭ) < p 0 := by
  let x := тИЪ(n : тДЭ)
  have hx_ge : x тЙе XтВА := by simpa using sqrt_le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast hn : (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n)
  have hx_pos : 0 < x := (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge
  have hlog_pos : 0 < log x := log_pos ((by grind : (1 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge)
  set ╬╡ := 1 / (log x) ^ 3 with h╬╡_def
  have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy : 0 < y) (hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x) {p : тДХ}
      (hp : (p : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (p : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
      div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
        (rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
    calc (p : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hp
      _ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
      _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; grind
  have h╬╡_pos : 0 < ╬╡ := by positivity
  have hx1_ge : x * (1 + ╬╡) тЙе XтВА := hx_ge.trans (le_mul_of_one_le_right hx_pos.le (by grind))
  have hx2_ge : x * (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе XтВА := hx_ge.trans (le_mul_of_one_le_right hx_pos.le
    (by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ╬╡]))
  obtain тЯиpтВА, hpтВА_prime, hpтВА_lb, hpтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 x hx_ge
  obtain тЯиpтВБ, hpтВБ_prime, hpтВБ_lb, hpтВБ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 _ hx1_ge
  obtain тЯиpтВВ, hpтВВ_prime, hpтВВ_lb, hpтВВ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 _ hx2_ge
  have hpтВА_ub' : (pтВА : тДЭ) тЙд x * (1 + ╬╡) := upper hx_pos le_rfl hpтВА_ub
  have hpтВБ_ub' : (pтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд x * (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
    linarith [sq (1 + ╬╡), upper (by grind) (log_le_log hx_pos (by grind)) hpтВБ_ub]
  have hpтВВ_ub' : (pтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд x * (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by
    linarith [pow_succ (1 + ╬╡) 2, upper (by grind) (log_le_log hx_pos (by grind)) hpтВВ_ub]

Now I understand the context better. The exists_q_primes theorem is similar to exists_p_primes, but for the "large primes" q_i. The key differences based on the blueprint:

  • For p_i: primes satisfy p_i тЙд тИЪn * (1 + 1/log┬│тИЪn)^(i+1) and тИЪn < pтВБ
  • For q_i: primes satisfy q_{4-i} тЙе n * (1 + 1/log┬│тИЪn)^{-i} and qтВБ < qтВВ < qтВГ < n

In the Lean statement, the bound is:

...

Now I understand the context better. The exists_q_primes theorem is similar to exists_p_primes, but for the "large primes" q_i. The key differences based on the blueprint:

  • For p_i: primes satisfy p_i тЙд тИЪn * (1 + 1/log┬│тИЪn)^(i+1) and тИЪn < pтВБ
  • For q_i: primes satisfy q_{4-i} тЙе n * (1 + 1/log┬│тИЪn)^{-i} and qтВБ < qтВВ < qтВГ < n

In the Lean statement, the bound is:
n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i

And we need q 2 < n.

So for:

  • i = 0: n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-3} тЙд q 0
  • i = 1: n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-2} тЙд q 1
  • i = 2: n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-1} тЙд q 2

And q 2 < n.

The proof approach from the blueprint is to apply Dusart's theorem (proposition_5_4) with values slightly below n. Let me check what Dusart.proposition_5_4 provides.

Looking at the exists_p_primes proof, it uses Dusart.proposition_5_4 which gives a prime in an interval. Let me search for this.

61-def E╧А.classicalBound (A B C R xтВА : тДЭ) : Prop := тИА x тЙе xтВА, E╧А x тЙд admissible_bound A B C R x
62-
63-def E╧А.vinogradovBound (A B C xтВА : тДЭ) : Prop := тИА x тЙе xтВА, E╧А x тЙд A * (log x) ^ B * exp (-C * (log x) ^ (3/5) / (log (log x)) ^ (1/5))
64-
65-def E╧А.bound (╬╡ xтВА : тДЭ) : Prop := тИА x тЙе xтВА, E╧А x тЙд ╬╡
66-
67:def HasPrimeInInterval (x h : тДЭ) : Prop :=
68-  тИГ p : тДХ, Nat.Prime p тИз x < p тИз p тЙд x + h
69-
70:def HasPrimeInInterval.log_thm (XтВА : тДЭ) (k : тДЭ) :=
71:  тИА x тЙе XтВА, HasPrimeInInterval x (x / (log x)^k)

Now I understand! HasPrimeInInterval x h means there exists a prime p with x < p and p тЙд x + h. And HasPrimeInInterval.log_thm 89693 3 is equivalent to: for all x тЙе 89693, HasPrimeInInterval x (x / (log x)^3).

So Dusart.proposition_5_4 states: for all x тЙе 89693, there exists a prime p with x < p тЙд x + x/(log x)┬│ = x * (1 + 1/(log x)┬│).

Looking at exists_p_primes:

...

Now I understand! HasPrimeInInterval x h means there exists a prime p with x < p and p тЙд x + h. And HasPrimeInInterval.log_thm 89693 3 is equivalent to: for all x тЙе 89693, HasPrimeInInterval x (x / (log x)^3).

So Dusart.proposition_5_4 states: for all x тЙе 89693, there exists a prime p with x < p тЙд x + x/(log x)┬│ = x * (1 + 1/(log x)┬│).

Looking at exists_p_primes:

  • It applies Dusart.proposition_5_4 with x = тИЪn, x(1+╬╡), x(1+╬╡)┬▓ to get primes pтВА, pтВБ, pтВВ
  • The bounds are p_i тЙд x * (1 + ╬╡)^(i+1) where ╬╡ = 1/(log x)┬│

For exists_q_primes:

  • We need q_i with n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-(3-i)} тЙд q_i where ╬╡ = 1/(log тИЪn)┬│
  • And qтВВ < n

Looking at the indexing in the statement:

  • For i = 0: n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-3} тЙд q 0
  • For i = 1: n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-2} тЙд q 1
  • For i = 2: n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-1} тЙд q 2 < n

So we want three primes just below n. The approach is:

  • Use Dusart at x = n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-3} to get qтВА with x < qтВА тЙд x + x/(log x)┬│

  • Apply Dusart similarly at x = n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-2} and x = n * (1 + ╬╡)^{-1} to get qтВБ and qтВВ. The key constraint is ensuring qтВВ < n, which follows since x = n/(1+╬╡) gives a prime p with x < p тЙд x(1 + 1/(log x)┬│), and this upper bound stays below n when ╬╡ is small enough. } for i = 1, 2, 3.

I should define xтВА = n / (1 + ╬╡)┬│, xтВБ = n / (1 + ╬╡)┬▓, and xтВВ = n / (1 + ╬╡) where ╬╡ = 1/(log тИЪn)┬│, then apply Dusart's theorem at each point to extract the three primes. The challenge is verifying that xтВВ + xтВВ/(log xтВВ)┬│ < n to ensure the upper bound holds. There's a useful pattern in the existing exists_p_primes proof that might apply here as well.

Looking at how the upper lemma works, it converts the Dusart bound p тЙд y + y/(log y)┬│ into the form p тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) by relating ╬╡ to log x where x is the original тИЪn. I should follow a similar strategy but adapted for lower bounds. The approach would be to set x := тИЪn and ╬╡ := 1/(log x)┬│, then define the three scaled values yтВА, yтВБ, yтВВ as successive applications of (1+╬╡), apply Dusart at each to obtain the primes, and use the lower bound from Dusart to establish the inequalities.

The key steps are verifying that each y_i тЙд q_i (which follows from the lower bound structure), confirming the primes are strictly increasing, and showing qтВВ stays below n. Since y_i = n/(1+╬╡)^{3-i} = n * (1+╬╡)^{-(3-i)}, this directly gives the required lower bound form. For the upper bound on qтВВ, the Dusart upper bound qтВВ тЙд yтВВ + yтВВ/(log yтВВ)┬│ with yтВВ = n/(1+╬╡) should yield qтВВ < n through the same ╬╡-based argument used in the upper lemma. n * (1 + ╬╡), so тИЪn > 1 + ╬╡ holds since тИЪn тЙе 89693 and ╬╡ = 1/(log тИЪn)┬│ is tiny.

Now I need to verify the upper bound works: qтВВ тЙд yтВВ + yтВВ/(log yтВВ)┬│ < n. Rearranging, yтВВ(1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│) < n, and substituting yтВВ = n/(1+╬╡) gives n(1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│)/(1+╬╡) < n, which simplifies to checking whether 1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│ < 1 + ╬╡.

This reduces to (log yтВВ)┬│ > (log тИЪn)┬│, meaning yтВВ > тИЪn. Since yтВВ = n/(1+╬╡) with ╬╡ small and n large, this inequality holds.

For the specific case where тИЪn = 89693 and log(89693) тЙИ 11.4, we get 1/(log тИЪn)┬│ тЙИ 0.00067, so тИЪn vastly exceeds 1 + ╬╡. The condition is satisfied.

Now I should verify that yтВА, yтВБ, and yтВВ all meet the threshold XтВА = 89693 required for applying Dusart's bounds.

When n = XтВА┬▓, we have yтВВ = XтВА┬▓/(1+╬╡) > XтВА, yтВБ = XтВА┬▓/(1+╬╡)┬▓ > XтВА, and yтВА = XтВА┬▓/(1+╬╡)┬│ > XтВА. All three values exceed the required minimum.

Now I can begin constructing the proof, mirroring the approach used in exists_p_primes.

Now let me write the proof. The approach:

  1. Set x := тИЪn, ╬╡ := 1/(log x)┬│
  2. Define yтВА, yтВБ, yтВВ as n/(1+╬╡)┬│, n/(1+╬╡)┬▓, n/(1+╬╡)
  3. Apply Dusart at each y_i to get primes q_i
  4. The Dusart lower bound gives n*(1+╬╡)^{-(3-i)} < q_i
  5. Need to establish qтВА < qтВБ < qтВВ < n

theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
- тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (p i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
+ тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (q i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
(тИА i : Fin 3, n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i) тИз q 2 < n := by
- sorry
+ let x := тИЪ(n : тДЭ)
+ have hx_ge : x тЙе XтВА := by simpa using sqrt_le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast hn : (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n)
+ have hx_pos : 0 < x := (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge
+ have hlog_pos : 0 < log x := log_pos ((by grind : (1 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge)
+ set ╬╡ := 1 / (log x) ^ 3 with h╬╡_def
+ have h╬╡_pos : 0 < ╬╡ := by positivity
+ have h1╬╡_pos : 0 < 1 + ╬╡ := by linarith
+ have hn_pos : (0 : тДЭ) < n := by
+ have : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА ^ 2 := by grind
+ linarith [show (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n by exact_mod_cast hn]
+ -- Define y_i = n / (1 + ╬╡)^(3-i), and show y_i тЙе XтВА
+ have hyтВА_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе XтВА := by
+ have h1 : (n : тДЭ) тЙе x ^ 2 := by simp [sq_sqrt hn_pos.le]
+ have h2 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд 2 := by
+ have h╬╡_small : ╬╡ тЙд 1 / 11.4 ^ 3 := by
+ simp only [h╬╡_def]
+ apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 1)
+ ┬╖ apply pow_pos; linarith [log_XтВА_gt]
+ ┬╖ apply pow_le_pow_left hlog_pos.le
+ calc log x тЙе log XтВА := log_le_log (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА) hx_ge
+ _ > 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt
+ calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := by
+ apply pow_le_pow_left (by linarith) (by linarith)
+ _ < 2 := by norm_num
+ calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right h1; positivity
+ _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h2
+ _ тЙе XтВА ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (sq_le_sq' (by linarith) hx_ge); norm_num
+ _ тЙе XтВА := by norm_num
+ have hyтВБ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВА_ge (by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le
+ (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))
+ have hyтВВ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВБ_ge (by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le
+ (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))
+ -- Apply Dusart to get primes
+ obtain тЯиqтВА, hqтВА_prime, hqтВА_lb, hqтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) hyтВА_ge
+ obtain тЯиqтВБ, hqтВБ_prime, hqтВБ_lb, hqтВБ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) hyтВБ_ge
+ obtain тЯиqтВВ, hqтВВ_prime, hqтВВ_lb, hqтВВ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡)) hyтВВ_ge
+ -- Upper bound helper: show q_i upper bound implies q_i < next threshold
+ have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy_pos : 0 < y) (hy_ge : y тЙе x) {q : тДХ}
+ (hq : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
+ have hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x := log_le_log hx_pos hy_ge
+ have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
+ div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy_pos.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
+ (rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
+ calc (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hq
+ _ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
+ _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; grind
+ -- Show y_i тЙе x (needed for upper bound helper)
+ have hyтВА_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x := by
+ rw [ge_iff_le, тЖР div_le_iff hn_pos, тЖР sqrt_div hn_pos.le]
+ calc тИЪ(n / n) = 1 := by rw [div_self hn_pos.ne']; norm_num
+ _ тЙд 1 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by
+ rw [one_le_div (by positivity)]
+ calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1/11.4^3)^3 := by

theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (q i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
(тИА i : Fin 3, n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i) тИз q 2 < n := by

+ -- Apply Dusart to get primes
+ obtain тЯиqтВА, hqтВА_prime, hqтВА_lb, hqтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) hyтВА_ge

+ (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))
+ have hyтВВ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе x := le_trans hyтВБ_ge_x (by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le
+ (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))
+ -- Get upper bounds

+ calc (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) * (1 + ╬╡) := this

+ have hqтВБ_ub' : (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
+ have := upper (by positivity) hyтВБ_ge_x hqтВБ_ub
+ calc (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
+ _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp; ring
+ have hqтВВ_ub' : (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n := by
+ have := upper (by positivity) hyтВВ_ge_x hqтВВ_ub
+ calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := this

+ have hqтВА_lt_qтВБ : qтВА < qтВБ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВА_ub'.trans_lt hqтВБ_lb)
+ have hqтВБ_lt_qтВВ : qтВБ < qтВВ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВБ_ub'.trans_lt hqтВВ_lb)
+ -- qтВВ < n : since qтВВ is prime and qтВВ тЙд n, and n тЙе XтВА┬▓ is not prime (it's a square тЙе 4)
+ have hqтВВ_lt_n : qтВВ < n := by
+ have hqтВВ_le_n : qтВВ тЙд n := Nat.cast_le.mp hqтВВ_ub'

+ ┬╖ exact h
+ ┬╖ exfalso
+ rw [h] at hqтВВ_prime
+ have hn_ge_4 : n тЙе 4 := le_trans (by norm_num : (4 : тДХ) тЙд XтВА ^ 2) hn
+ have hn_sq : тИГ m : тДХ, m тЙе 2 тИз m ^ 2 тЙд n := тЯи2, by norm_num, hn_ge_4тЯй
+ -- n is at least XтВА┬▓, which is a perfect square, but n itself need not be a perfect square
+ -- However, qтВВ тЙд n and qтВВ > n/(1+╬╡), so qтВВ is very close to n
+ -- The issue is that qтВВ = n would mean n is prime
+ -- But we also have qтВБ < qтВВ = n and qтВБ > n/(1+╬╡)┬▓, so there's a prime in (n/(1+╬╡)┬▓, n)
+ -- This is fine - n could be prime. The issue is the Dusart bound gives qтВВ тЙд n/(1+╬╡) * (1 + ╬╡) = n
+ -- but actually we need strict inequality.
+ -- The real argument: the Dusart interval for yтВВ = n/(1+╬╡) is (yтВВ, yтВВ + yтВВ/(log yтВВ)┬│]
+ -- The upper end is yтВВ * (1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│) < yтВВ * (1 + ╬╡) = n (since log yтВВ > log x)
+ -- So qтВВ < n strictly!

+ apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left (by norm_num) (by positivity)

+ fin_cases i
+ ┬╖ simp only [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Fin.val_zero]
+ calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪтЖСn) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 0)) = n * (1 + ╬╡) ^ (-3 : тДЭ) := by
+ simp only [h╬╡_def, sub_zero]; ring_nf
+ _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
+ _ < qтВА := hqтВА_lb
+ ┬╖ simp only [Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons, Fin.val_one]

+ simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring_nf

  (proofUses := ["thm:Dusart"])
  (latexEnv := "lemma")]
theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
    тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (q i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
      (тИА i : Fin 3, n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i) тИз q 2 < n := by
  let x := тИЪ(n : тДЭ)
  have hx_ge : x тЙе XтВА := by simpa using sqrt_le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast hn : (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n)
  have hx_pos : 0 < x := (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge
  have hlog_pos : 0 < log x := log_pos ((by grind : (1 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge)
  set ╬╡ := 1 / (log x) ^ 3 with h╬╡_def
  have h╬╡_pos : 0 < ╬╡ := by positivity
  have h1╬╡_pos : 0 < 1 + ╬╡ := by linarith
  have hn_pos : (0 : тДЭ) < n := by
    have : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА ^ 2 := by grind
    linarith [show (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n by exact_mod_cast hn]
  -- Define y_i = n / (1 + ╬╡)^(3-i), and show y_i тЙе XтВА
  have hyтВА_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе XтВА := by
    have h1 : (n : тДЭ) тЙе x ^ 2 := by simp [sq_sqrt hn_pos.le]
    have h2 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд 2 := by
      have h╬╡_small : ╬╡ тЙд 1 / 11.4 ^ 3 := by
        simp only [h╬╡_def]
        apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 1)
        ┬╖ apply pow_pos; linarith [log_XтВА_gt]
        ┬╖ apply pow_le_pow_left hlog_pos.le
          calc log x тЙе log XтВА := log_le_log (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА) hx_ge
            _ > 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt
      calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := by
            apply pow_le_pow_left (by linarith) (by linarith)
        _ < 2 := by norm_num
    calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right h1; positivity
      _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h2
      _ тЙе XтВА ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (sq_le_sq' (by linarith) hx_ge); norm_num
      _ тЙе XтВА := by norm_num
  have hyтВБ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВА_ge (by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le
    (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))
  have hyтВВ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВБ_ge (by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le
    (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))
  -- Apply Dusart to get primes
  obtain тЯиqтВА, hqтВА_prime, hqтВА_lb, hqтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) hyтВА_ge
  obtain тЯиqтВБ, hqтВБ_prime, hqтВБ_lb, hqтВБ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) hyтВБ_ge
  obtain тЯиqтВВ, hqтВВ_prime, hqтВВ_lb, hqтВВ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡)) hyтВВ_ge
  -- Upper bound helper: show q_i upper bound implies q_i < next threshold
  have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy_pos : 0 < y) (hy_ge : y тЙе x) {q : тДХ}
      (hq : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x := log_le_log hx_pos hy_ge
    have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
      div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy_pos.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
        (rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
    calc (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hq
      _ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
      _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; grind
  -- Show y_i тЙе x (needed for upper bound helper)
  have hyтВА_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x := by
    rw [ge_iff_le, тЖР div_le_iff hn_pos, тЖР sqrt_div hn_pos.le]
    calc тИЪ(n / n) = 1 := by rw [div_self hn_pos.ne']; norm_num
      _ тЙд 1 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by
        rw [one_le_div (by positivity)]
        calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1/11.4^3)^3 := by
              apply pow_le_pow_left (by linarith)
              have : ╬╡ тЙд 1 / 11.4 ^ 3 := by
                simp only [h╬╡_def]
                apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 1)
                ┬╖ apply pow_pos; linarith [log_XтВА_gt]
                ┬╖ apply pow_le_pow_left hlog_pos.le
                  calc log x тЙе log XтВА := log_le_log (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА) hx_ge
                    _ > 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt
              linarith
          _ < 2 := by norm_num
          _ тЙд x := by linarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
  have hyтВБ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе x := le_trans hyтВА_ge_x (by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le
    (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))
  have hyтВВ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе x := le_trans hyтВБ_ge_x (by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le
    (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))
  -- Get upper bounds
  have hqтВА_ub' : (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВА_ge_x hqтВА_ub
    calc (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
  have hqтВБ_ub' : (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВБ_ge_x hqтВБ_ub
    calc (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp; ring
  have hqтВВ_ub' : (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВВ_ge_x hqтВВ_ub
    calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n := by field_simp
  -- StrictMono: qтВА < qтВБ < qтВВ
  have hqтВА_lt_qтВБ : qтВА < qтВБ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВА_ub'.trans_lt hqтВБ_lb)
  have hqтВБ_lt_qтВВ : qтВБ < qтВВ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВБ_ub'.trans_lt hqтВВ_lb)
  -- qтВВ < n : since qтВВ is prime and qтВВ тЙд n, and n тЙе XтВА┬▓ is not prime (it's a square тЙе 4)
  have hqтВВ_lt_n : qтВВ < n := by
    have hqтВВ_le_n : qтВВ тЙд n := Nat.cast_le.mp hqтВВ_ub'
    cases' hqтВВ_le_n.lt_or_eq with h h
    ┬╖ exact h
    ┬╖ exfalso
      rw [h] at hqтВВ_prime
      have hn_ge_4 : n тЙе 4 := le_trans (by norm_num : (4 : тДХ) тЙд XтВА ^ 2) hn
      have hn_sq : тИГ m : тДХ, m тЙе 2 тИз m ^ 2 тЙд n := тЯи2, by norm_num, hn_ge_4тЯй
      -- n is at least XтВА┬▓, which is a perfect square, but n itself need not be a perfect square
      -- However, qтВВ тЙд n and qтВВ > n/(1+╬╡), so qтВВ is very close to n
      -- The issue is that qтВВ = n would mean n is prime
      -- But we also have qтВБ < qтВВ = n and qтВБ > n/(1+╬╡)┬▓, so there's a prime in (n/(1+╬╡)┬▓, n)
      -- This is fine - n could be prime. The issue is the Dusart bound gives qтВВ тЙд n/(1+╬╡) * (1 + ╬╡) = n
      -- but actually we need strict inequality.
      -- The real argument: the Dusart interval for yтВВ = n/(1+╬╡) is (yтВВ, yтВВ + yтВВ/(log yтВВ)┬│]
      -- The upper end is yтВВ * (1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│) < yтВВ * (1 + ╬╡) = n (since log yтВВ > log x)
      -- So qтВВ < n strictly!
      have hlog_yтВВ : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := by
        apply log_lt_log hx_pos
        calc x = тИЪn := rfl
          _ < n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
            rw [lt_div_iff h1╬╡_pos]
            calc тИЪn * (1 + ╬╡) < тИЪn * 2 := by nlinarith
              _ тЙд тИЪn * тИЪn := by
                apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (sqrt_nonneg _)
                rw [show (2 : тДЭ) = тИЪ4 by norm_num]
                apply sqrt_le_sqrt
                calc (4 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА ^ 2 := by norm_num
                  _ тЙд n := by exact_mod_cast hn
              _ = n := sq_sqrt hn_pos.le
      have hqтВВ_strict : (qтВВ : тДЭ) < n := by
        calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) + (n / (1 + ╬╡)) / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hqтВВ_ub
          _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by ring
          _ < (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
            apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by positivity)
            apply add_lt_add_left
            apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left (by norm_num) (by positivity)
            apply pow_lt_pow_left hlog_yтВВ.le (by positivity)
            norm_num
          _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring
          _ = n := by field_simp
      linarith [hqтВВ_strict, show (qтВВ : тДЭ) = n by exact_mod_cast h]
  refine тЯи![qтВА, qтВБ, qтВВ], fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption,
    Fin.strictMono_iff_lt_succ.mpr fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption, fun i тЖж ?_, hqтВВ_lt_nтЯй
  fin_cases i
  ┬╖ simp only [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Fin.val_zero]
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪтЖСn) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 0)) = n * (1 + ╬╡) ^ (-3 : тДЭ) := by
          simp only [h╬╡_def, sub_zero]; ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
      _ < qтВА := hqтВА_lb
  ┬╖ simp only [Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons, Fin.val_one]
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪтЖСn) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 1)) = n * (1 + ╬╡) ^ (-2 : тДЭ) := by
          simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
      _ < qтВБ := hqтВБ_lb
  ┬╖ simp only [Matrix.cons_val_succ_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Fin.val_ofNat']
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪтЖСn) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 2)) = n * (1 + ╬╡) ^ (-1 : тДЭ) := by
          simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_one]; field_simp
      _ < qтВВ := hqтВВ_lb

  let x := тИЪ(n : тДЭ)
  have hx_ge : x тЙе XтВА := by simpa using sqrt_le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast hn : (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n)
  have hx_pos : 0 < x := (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge
  have hlog_pos : 0 < log x := log_pos ((by grind : (1 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge)
  set ╬╡ := 1 / (log x) ^ 3 with h╬╡_def
  have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy : 0 < y) (hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x) {p : тДХ}
      (hp : (p : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (p : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
      div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
        (rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
    calc (p : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hp
      _ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
      _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; grind
  have h╬╡_pos : 0 < ╬╡ := by positivity
  have hx1_ge : x * (1 + ╬╡) тЙе XтВА := hx_ge.trans (le_mul_of_one_le_right hx_pos.le (by grind))
  have hx2_ge : x * (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе XтВА := hx_ge.trans (le_mul_of_one_le_right hx_pos.le
    (by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ╬╡]))
  obtain тЯиpтВА, hpтВА_prime, hpтВА_lb, hpтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 x hx_ge
  obtain тЯиpтВБ, hpтВБ_prime, hpтВБ_lb, hpтВБ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 _ hx1_ge
  obtain тЯиpтВВ, hpтВВ_prime, hpтВВ_lb, hpтВВ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 _ hx2_ge
  have hpтВА_ub' : (pтВА : тДЭ) тЙд x * (1 + ╬╡) := upper hx_pos le_rfl hpтВА_ub
  have hpтВБ_ub' : (pтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд x * (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
    linarith [sq (1 + ╬╡), upper (by grind) (log_le_log hx_pos (by grind)) hpтВБ_ub]
  have hpтВВ_ub' : (pтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд x * (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by
    linarith [pow_succ (1 + ╬╡) 2, upper (by grind) (log_le_log hx_pos (by grind)) hpтВВ_ub]
  refine тЯи![pтВА, pтВБ, pтВВ], fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption, Fin.strictMono_iff_lt_succ.mpr fun i тЖж by
    fin_cases i
    ┬╖ exact cast_lt.mp (hpтВА_ub'.trans_lt hpтВБ_lb)
    ┬╖ exact cast_lt.mp (hpтВБ_ub'.trans_lt hpтВВ_lb), fun i тЖж ?_, hpтВА_lbтЯй
  fin_cases i <;> norm_num

theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (q i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
(тИА i : Fin 3, n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i) тИз q 2 < n := by
let x := тИЪ(n : тДЭ)
have hx_ge : x тЙе XтВА := by simpa using sqrt_le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast hn : (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n)
have hx_pos : 0 < x := (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge
have hlog_pos : 0 < log x := log_pos ((by grind : (1 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge)
set ╬╡ := 1 / (log x) ^ 3 with h╬╡_def
have h╬╡_pos : 0 < ╬╡ := by positivity
have h1╬╡_pos : 0 < 1 + ╬╡ := by linarith
have hn_pos : (0 : тДЭ) < n := by
have : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА ^ 2 := by grind
linarith [show (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n by exact_mod_cast hn]
+ have hn_eq_x2 : (n : тДЭ) = x ^ 2 := (sq_sqrt hn_pos.le).symm
+ -- Show that ╬╡ is small (╬╡ тЙд 1/11.4┬│)
+ have h╬╡_small : ╬╡ тЙд 1 / 11.4 ^ 3 := by
+ simp only [h╬╡_def]
+ apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 1)
+ ┬╖ apply pow_pos; linarith [log_XтВА_gt]
+ ┬╖ apply pow_le_pow_left hlog_pos.le
+ calc log x тЙе log XтВА := log_le_log (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА) hx_ge
+ _ > 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt
+ have h1╬╡3_le_2 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд 2 := calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := by
+ nlinarith [sq_nonneg ╬╡, sq_nonneg (1 + ╬╡)]
+ _ < 2 := by norm_num
-- Define y_i = n / (1 + ╬╡)^(3-i), and show y_i тЙе XтВА
have hyтВА_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе XтВА := by
+ calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by
+ rw [тЖР hn_eq_x2]
+ _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by
- have h1 : (n : тДЭ) тЙе x ^ 2 := by simp [sq_sqrt hn_pos.le]
+ apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h1╬╡3_le_2
- have h2 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд 2 := by
- have h╬╡_small : ╬╡ тЙд 1 / 11.4 ^ 3 := by
- simp only [h╬╡_def]
- apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 1)
- ┬╖ apply pow_pos; linarith [log_XтВА_gt]
- ┬╖ apply pow_le_pow_left hlog_pos.le
- calc log x тЙе log XтВА := log_le_log (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА) hx_ge
- _ > 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt
- calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := by
- apply pow_le_pow_left (by linarith) (by linarith)
- _ < 2 := by norm_num
- calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right h1; positivity
- _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h2
_ тЙе XтВА ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (sq_le_sq' (by linarith) hx_ge); norm_num

- (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))

- (by positivity); apply pow_le_pow_right (by linarith) (by norm_num))

-- Apply Dusart to get primes
obtain тЯиqтВА, hqтВА_prime, hqтВА_lb, hqтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) hyтВА_ge
obtain тЯиqтВБ, hqтВБ_prime, hqтВБ_lb, hqтВБ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) hyтВБ_ge
obtain тЯиqтВВ, hqтВВ_prime, hqтВВ_lb, hqтВВ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡)) hyтВВ_ge

+ -- Show y_i тЙе x (needed for upper bound helper)
+ have hyтВА_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x := by
+ calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [тЖР hn_eq_x2]
+ _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by
+ apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h1╬╡3_le_2
+ _ тЙе x * 1 := by
+ rw [mul_one, div_le_iff (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) < 2)]
+ calc 2 * x тЙд x * x := by nlinarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
+ _ = x ^ 2 := by ring
+ have hyтВБ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе x := le_trans hyтВА_ge_x (by
+ apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le (by positivity)
+ calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙд (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
+ _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by ring)
+ have hyтВВ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе x := le_trans hyтВБ_ge_x (by
+ apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le (by positivity)
+ calc 1 + ╬╡ тЙд (1 + ╬╡) * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
+ _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by ring)
+ -- Upper bound helper: show q_i upper bound implies q_i тЙд next threshold
have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy_pos : 0 < y) (hy_ge : y тЙе x) {q : тДХ}
(hq : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
have hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x := log_le_log hx_pos hy_ge
have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy_pos.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
(rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
calc (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hq
_ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
_ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; grind
- -- Show y_i тЙе x (needed for upper bound helper)
- have hyтВА_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x := by

- _ тЙд 1 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by
- rw [one_le_div (by positivity)]

- _ > 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt

- _ < 2 := by norm_num
- _ тЙд x := by linarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
- have hyтВБ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе x := le_trans hyтВА_ge_x (by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le

-- Get upper bounds
have hqтВА_ub' : (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВА_ge_x hqтВА_ub
calc (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
_ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
have hqтВБ_ub' : (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВБ_ge_x hqтВБ_ub
calc (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
_ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp; ring
have hqтВВ_ub' : (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВВ_ge_x hqтВВ_ub
calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
_ = n := by field_simp
-- StrictMono: qтВА < qтВБ < qтВВ
have hqтВА_lt_qтВБ : qтВА < qтВБ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВА_ub'.trans_lt hqтВБ_lb)
have hqтВБ_lt_qтВВ : qтВБ < qтВВ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВБ_ub'.trans_lt hqтВВ_lb)
- -- qтВВ < n : since qтВВ is prime and qтВВ тЙд n, and n тЙе XтВА┬▓ is not prime (it's a square тЙе 4)

have hqтВВ_lt_n : qтВВ < n := by
+ have hlog_yтВВ : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := by
+ apply log_lt_log hx_pos
+ calc x < x * x := by nlinarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
+ _ = x ^ 2 := by ring
+ _ = n := hn_eq_x2
+ _ > n / (1 + ╬╡) := by rw [div_lt_self_iff hn_pos]; linarith
+ _ > x := hyтВВ_ge_x
+ have hqтВВ_strict : (qтВВ : тДЭ) < n := by
+ calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) + (n / (1 + ╬╡)) / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hqтВВ_ub
+ _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by ring
+ _ < (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
+ apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by positivity)
+ apply add_lt_add_left
+ apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left (by norm_num) (by positivity)
+ apply pow_lt_pow_left hlog_yтВВ.le (by positivity)
+ norm_num
+ _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring
+ _ = n := by field_simp
+ exact Nat.cast_lt.mp hqтВВ_strict

- cases' hqтВВ_le_n.lt_or_eq with h h
- ┬╖ exact h
- ┬╖ exfalso
- rw [h] at hqтВВ_prime
- have hn_ge_4 : n тЙе 4 := le_trans (by norm_num : (4 : тДХ) тЙд XтВА ^ 2) hn
- have hn_sq : тИГ m : тДХ, m тЙе 2 тИз m ^ 2 тЙд n := тЯи2, by norm_num, hn_ge_4тЯй
- -- n is at least XтВА┬▓, which is a perfect square, but n itself need not be a perfect square
- -- However, qтВВ тЙд n and qтВВ > n/(1+╬╡), so qтВВ is very close to n
- -- The issue is that qтВВ = n would mean n is prime
- -- But we also have qтВБ < qтВВ = n and qтВБ > n/(1+╬╡)┬▓, so there's a prime in (n/(1+╬╡)┬▓, n)
- -- This is fine - n could be prime. The issue is the Dusart bound gives qтВВ тЙд n/(1+╬╡) * (1 + ╬╡) = n
- -- but actually we need strict inequality.
- -- The real argument: the Dusart interval for yтВВ = n/(1+╬╡) is (yтВВ, yтВВ + yтВВ/(log yтВВ)┬│]
- -- The upper end is yтВВ * (1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│) < yтВВ * (1 + ╬╡) = n (since log yтВВ > log x)
- -- So qтВВ < n strictly!
- have hlog_yтВВ : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := by
- apply log_lt_log hx_pos
- calc x = тИЪn := rfl
- _ < n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
- rw [lt_div_iff h1╬╡_pos]
- calc тИЪn * (1 + ╬╡) < тИЪn * 2 := by nlinarith

- apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (sqrt_nonneg _)

- apply sqrt_le_sqrt

- _ тЙд n := by exact_mod_cast hn
- _ = n := sq_sqrt hn_pos.le
- have hqтВВ_strict : (qтВВ : тДЭ) < n := by
- calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) + (n / (1 + ╬╡)) / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hqтВВ_ub
- _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by ring
- _ < (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
- apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by positivity)
- apply add_lt_add_left
- apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left (by norm_num) (by positivity)
- apply pow_lt_pow_left hlog_yтВВ.le (by positivity)
- norm_num
- _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring
- _ = n := by field_simp
- linarith [hqтВВ_strict, show (qтВВ : тДЭ) = n by exact_mod_cast h]

  (proofUses := ["thm:Dusart"])
  (latexEnv := "lemma")]
theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
    тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (q i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
      (тИА i : Fin 3, n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i) тИз q 2 < n := by
  let x := тИЪ(n : тДЭ)
  have hx_ge : x тЙе XтВА := by simpa using sqrt_le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast hn : (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n)
  have hx_pos : 0 < x := (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge
  have hlog_pos : 0 < log x := log_pos ((by grind : (1 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge)
  set ╬╡ := 1 / (log x) ^ 3 with h╬╡_def
  have h╬╡_pos : 0 < ╬╡ := by positivity
  have h1╬╡_pos : 0 < 1 + ╬╡ := by linarith
  have hn_pos : (0 : тДЭ) < n := by
    have : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА ^ 2 := by grind
    linarith [show (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n by exact_mod_cast hn]
  have hn_eq_x2 : (n : тДЭ) = x ^ 2 := (sq_sqrt hn_pos.le).symm
  -- Show that ╬╡ is small (╬╡ тЙд 1/11.4┬│)
  have h╬╡_small : ╬╡ тЙд 1 / 11.4 ^ 3 := by
    simp only [h╬╡_def]
    apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 1)
    ┬╖ apply pow_pos; linarith [log_XтВА_gt]
    ┬╖ apply pow_le_pow_left hlog_pos.le
      calc log x тЙе log XтВА := log_le_log (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА) hx_ge
        _ > 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt
  have h1╬╡3_le_2 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд 2 := calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg ╬╡, sq_nonneg (1 + ╬╡)]
      _ < 2 := by norm_num
  -- Define y_i = n / (1 + ╬╡)^(3-i), and show y_i тЙе XтВА
  have hyтВА_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе XтВА := by
    calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by
          rw [тЖР hn_eq_x2]
      _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by
          apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h1╬╡3_le_2
      _ тЙе XтВА ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (sq_le_sq' (by linarith) hx_ge); norm_num
      _ тЙе XтВА := by norm_num
  have hyтВБ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВА_ge (by
    apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le (by positivity)
    calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 * 1 := by ring
      _ тЙд (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
      _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by ring)
  have hyтВВ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВБ_ge (by
    apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le (by positivity)
    calc 1 + ╬╡ тЙд (1 + ╬╡) * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
      _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by ring)
  -- Apply Dusart to get primes
  obtain тЯиqтВА, hqтВА_prime, hqтВА_lb, hqтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) hyтВА_ge
  obtain тЯиqтВБ, hqтВБ_prime, hqтВБ_lb, hqтВБ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) hyтВБ_ge
  obtain тЯиqтВВ, hqтВВ_prime, hqтВВ_lb, hqтВВ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡)) hyтВВ_ge
  -- Show y_i тЙе x (needed for upper bound helper)
  have hyтВА_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x := by
    calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [тЖР hn_eq_x2]
      _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by
          apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h1╬╡3_le_2
      _ тЙе x * 1 := by
          rw [mul_one, div_le_iff (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) < 2)]
          calc 2 * x тЙд x * x := by nlinarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
            _ = x ^ 2 := by ring
  have hyтВБ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе x := le_trans hyтВА_ge_x (by
    apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le (by positivity)
    calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙд (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
      _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by ring)
  have hyтВВ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе x := le_trans hyтВБ_ge_x (by
    apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le (by positivity)
    calc 1 + ╬╡ тЙд (1 + ╬╡) * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
      _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by ring)
  -- Upper bound helper: show q_i upper bound implies q_i тЙд next threshold
  have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy_pos : 0 < y) (hy_ge : y тЙе x) {q : тДХ}
      (hq : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x := log_le_log hx_pos hy_ge
    have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
      div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy_pos.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
        (rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
    calc (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hq
      _ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
      _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; grind
  -- Get upper bounds
  have hqтВА_ub' : (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВА_ge_x hqтВА_ub
    calc (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
  have hqтВБ_ub' : (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВБ_ge_x hqтВБ_ub
    calc (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp; ring
  have hqтВВ_ub' : (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВВ_ge_x hqтВВ_ub
    calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n := by field_simp
  -- StrictMono: qтВА < qтВБ < qтВВ
  have hqтВА_lt_qтВБ : qтВА < qтВБ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВА_ub'.trans_lt hqтВБ_lb)
  have hqтВБ_lt_qтВВ : qтВБ < qтВВ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВБ_ub'.trans_lt hqтВВ_lb)
  -- qтВВ < n: the Dusart interval has upper bound yтВВ * (1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│) < yтВВ * (1 + ╬╡) = n
  have hqтВВ_lt_n : qтВВ < n := by
    have hlog_yтВВ : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := by
      apply log_lt_log hx_pos
      calc x < x * x := by nlinarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
        _ = x ^ 2 := by ring
        _ = n := hn_eq_x2
        _ > n / (1 + ╬╡) := by rw [div_lt_self_iff hn_pos]; linarith
        _ > x := hyтВВ_ge_x
    have hqтВВ_strict : (qтВВ : тДЭ) < n := by
      calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) + (n / (1 + ╬╡)) / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hqтВВ_ub
        _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by ring
        _ < (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
          apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by positivity)
          apply add_lt_add_left
          apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left (by norm_num) (by positivity)
          apply pow_lt_pow_left hlog_yтВВ.le (by positivity)
          norm_num
        _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring
        _ = n := by field_simp
    exact Nat.cast_lt.mp hqтВВ_strict
  refine тЯи![qтВА, qтВБ, qтВВ], fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption,
    Fin.strictMono_iff_lt_succ.mpr fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption, fun i тЖж ?_, hqтВВ_lt_nтЯй
  fin_cases i
  ┬╖ simp only [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Fin.val_zero]
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪтЖСn) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 0)) = n * (1 + ╬╡) ^ (-3 : тДЭ) := by
          simp only [h╬╡_def, sub_zero]; ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
      _ < qтВА := hqтВА_lb
  ┬╖ simp only [Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons, Fin.val_one]
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪтЖСn) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 1)) = n * (1 + ╬╡) ^ (-2 : тДЭ) := by
          simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
      _ < qтВБ := hqтВБ_lb
  ┬╖ simp only [Matrix.cons_val_succ_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Fin.val_ofNat']
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪтЖСn) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 2)) = n * (1 + ╬╡) ^ (-1 : тДЭ) := by
          simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_one]; field_simp
      _ < qтВВ := hqтВВ_lb

theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (q i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
(тИА i : Fin 3, n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i) тИз q 2 < n := by
let x := тИЪ(n : тДЭ)
have hx_ge : x тЙе XтВА := by simpa using sqrt_le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast hn : (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n)
have hx_pos : 0 < x := (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge
have hlog_pos : 0 < log x := log_pos ((by grind : (1 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge)
set ╬╡ := 1 / (log x) ^ 3 with h╬╡_def
have h╬╡_pos : 0 < ╬╡ := by positivity
have h1╬╡_pos : 0 < 1 + ╬╡ := by linarith
have hn_pos : (0 : тДЭ) < n := by
have : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА ^ 2 := by grind
linarith [show (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n by exact_mod_cast hn]
have hn_eq_x2 : (n : тДЭ) = x ^ 2 := (sq_sqrt hn_pos.le).symm
-- Show that ╬╡ is small (╬╡ тЙд 1/11.4┬│)
have hlog_ge_114 : log x тЙе 11.4 := by
calc log x тЙе log XтВА := log_le_log (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА) hx_ge
_ тЙе 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt.le
have h╬╡_small : ╬╡ тЙд 1 / 11.4 ^ 3 := by
simp only [h╬╡_def]
apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 1)
┬╖ apply pow_pos; linarith [log_XтВА_gt]
┬╖ apply pow_le_pow_leftтВА (by linarith : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 11.4) hlog_ge_114
have h1╬╡3_pos : 0 < (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by positivity
+ have h1╬╡2_pos : 0 < (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by positivity
have h1╬╡3_le_2 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд 2 := by
have h1 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := by
apply pow_le_pow_leftтВА (by linarith) (by linarith)
calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := h1
_ тЙд 2 := by norm_num
-- Define y_i = n / (1 + ╬╡)^(3-i), and show y_i тЙе XтВА
have hyтВА_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе XтВА := by
calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 = x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [hn_eq_x2]
_ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by
apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h1╬╡3_le_2
_ тЙе XтВА ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (sq_le_sq' (by linarith) hx_ge); norm_num
_ тЙе XтВА := by norm_num
+ have h1╬╡2_le_1╬╡3 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙд (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ╬╡]
+ have h1╬╡_le_1╬╡2 : 1 + ╬╡ тЙд (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ╬╡]
- have hyтВБ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВА_ge (by
+ have hyтВБ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВА_ge
- apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡3_pos
+ (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡2_pos h1╬╡2_le_1╬╡3)
- calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 * 1 := by ring
+ have hyтВВ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВБ_ge

+ (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡_pos h1╬╡_le_1╬╡2)
- _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by ring)
- have hyтВВ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВБ_ge (by
- apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le (by positivity)
- calc 1 + ╬╡ тЙд (1 + ╬╡) * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
- _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by ring)
-- Apply Dusart to get primes
obtain тЯиqтВА, hqтВА_prime, hqтВА_lb, hqтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) hyтВА_ge
obtain тЯиqтВБ, hqтВБ_prime, hqтВБ_lb, hqтВБ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) hyтВБ_ge
obtain тЯиqтВВ, hqтВВ_prime, hqтВВ_lb, hqтВВ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡)) hyтВВ_ge
-- Show y_i тЙе x (needed for upper bound helper)
+ have hx_ge_2 : x тЙе 2 := by linarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
have hyтВА_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x := by
- have hx_ge_2 : x тЙе 2 := by linarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 = x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [hn_eq_x2]
- _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by

- _ тЙе x := by
+ _ тЙе x := by rw [ge_iff_le, le_div_iffтВА (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) < 2)]; nlinarith
- rw [ge_iff_le, le_div_iffтВА (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) < 2)]
- calc 2 * x тЙд x * x := by nlinarith
+ have hyтВБ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе x := le_trans hyтВА_ge_x
- _ = x ^ 2 := by ring
- have hyтВБ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе x := le_trans hyтВА_ge_x (by
- apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡3_pos
+ (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡2_pos h1╬╡2_le_1╬╡3)
- calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙд (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
+ have hyтВВ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе x := le_trans hyтВБ_ge_x
- _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by ring)
+ (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡_pos h1╬╡_le_1╬╡2)
- have hyтВВ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе x := le_trans hyтВБ_ge_x (by
- apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le (by positivity)
- calc 1 + ╬╡ тЙд (1 + ╬╡) * (1 + ╬╡) := by nlinarith
- _ = (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by ring)
-- Upper bound helper: show q_i upper bound implies q_i тЙд next threshold
have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy_pos : 0 < y) (hy_ge : y тЙе x) {q : тДХ}
(hq : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
have hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x := log_le_log hx_pos hy_ge
have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy_pos.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
(rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
calc (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hq
_ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
- _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; grind
+ _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; field_simp; ring
-- Get upper bounds
have hqтВА_ub' : (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВА_ge_x hqтВА_ub
calc (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
_ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
have hqтВБ_ub' : (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВБ_ge_x hqтВБ_ub
calc (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
_ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp; ring
have hqтВВ_ub' : (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВВ_ge_x hqтВВ_ub
calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
_ = n := by field_simp
-- StrictMono: qтВА < qтВБ < qтВВ
have hqтВА_lt_qтВБ : qтВА < qтВБ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВА_ub'.trans_lt hqтВБ_lb)
have hqтВБ_lt_qтВВ : qтВБ < qтВВ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВБ_ub'.trans_lt hqтВВ_lb)
-- qтВВ < n: the Dusart interval has upper bound yтВВ * (1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│) < yтВВ * (1 + ╬╡) = n
have hqтВВ_lt_n : qтВВ < n := by
+ have hyтВВ_lt_n : n / (1 + ╬╡) < n := by rw [div_lt_self_iff hn_pos]; linarith
- have hlog_yтВВ : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := by
+ have hlog_yтВВ_gt : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := by
apply log_lt_log hx_pos
+ calc x < n / (1 + ╬╡) := lt_of_le_of_lt hyтВВ_ge_x hyтВВ_lt_n |>.trans_le le_rfl
- calc x < x * x := by nlinarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
- _ = x ^ 2 := by ring
- _ = n := hn_eq_x2
- _ > n / (1 + ╬╡) := by rw [div_lt_self_iff hn_pos]; linarith
- _ > x := hyтВВ_ge_x
have hqтВВ_strict : (qтВВ : тДЭ) < n := by
+ have hlog_yтВВ_pow_pos : 0 < (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := by positivity
calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) + (n / (1 + ╬╡)) / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hqтВВ_ub
- _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by ring
+ _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by field_simp; ring
_ < (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by positivity)
+ gcongr
- apply add_lt_add_left
+ apply pow_lt_pow_left hlog_yтВВ_gt.le hlog_pos.le (by norm_num)
- apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left (by norm_num) (by positivity)
- apply pow_lt_pow_left hlog_yтВВ.le (by positivity)
- norm_num
+ _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; field_simp; ring
- _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; ring
_ = n := by field_simp
exact Nat.cast_lt.mp hqтВВ_strict
refine тЯи![qтВА, qтВБ, qтВВ], fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption,
Fin.strictMono_iff_lt_succ.mpr fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption, fun i тЖж ?_, hqтВВ_lt_nтЯй
fin_cases i <;> simp only [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons,
- Matrix.cons_val_succ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_ofNat', h╬╡_def]
+ Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, h╬╡_def]
+ ┬╖ simp only [Fin.val_zero, CharP.cast_eq_zero, sub_zero]
- ┬╖ calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - (0 : тДХ)))
+ calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 : тДЭ))
- = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-3 : тДЭ) := by norm_cast; ring_nf
+ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ 3 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
- _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ 3 := by
- rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
_ тЙд qтВА := hqтВА_lb.le
+ ┬╖ simp only [Fin.val_one, Nat.cast_one]
- ┬╖ calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - (1 : тДХ)))
+ calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 1 : тДЭ))
- = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-2 : тДЭ) := by norm_cast; ring_nf
+ = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-2 : тДЭ) := by ring_nf
- _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ 2 := by
+ _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ 2 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
- rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
_ тЙд qтВБ := hqтВБ_lb.le
+ ┬╖ simp only [Fin.val_ofNat, Nat.reduceMod, Nat.cast_ofNat]
- ┬╖ calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - (2 : тДХ)))
+ calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 2 : тДЭ))
- = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-1 : тДЭ) := by norm_cast; ring_nf
+ = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-1 : тДЭ) := by ring_nf
- _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
+ _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_one]; field_simp
- rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_one]; field_simp
_ тЙд qтВВ := hqтВВ_lb.le

theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :

  enough, these intervals lie in \((\sqrt{n},n)\) and contain primes \(q_i\) with the desired
  ordering. -/)
  (proofUses := ["thm:Dusart"])
  (latexEnv := "lemma")]
theorem exists_q_primes {n : тДХ} (hn : n тЙе XтВА ^ 2) :
    тИГ q : Fin 3 тЖТ тДХ, (тИА i, Nat.Prime (q i)) тИз StrictMono q тИз
      (тИА i : Fin 3, n * (1 + 1 / (log тИЪ(n : тДЭ)) ^ 3) ^ (-((3 : тДЭ) - (i : тДХ))) тЙд q i) тИз q 2 < n := by
  let x := тИЪ(n : тДЭ)
  have hx_ge : x тЙе XтВА := by simpa using sqrt_le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast hn : (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n)
  have hx_pos : 0 < x := (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge
  have hlog_pos : 0 < log x := log_pos ((by grind : (1 : тДЭ) < XтВА).trans_le hx_ge)
  set ╬╡ := 1 / (log x) ^ 3 with h╬╡_def
  have h╬╡_pos : 0 < ╬╡ := by positivity
  have h1╬╡_pos : 0 < 1 + ╬╡ := by linarith
  have hn_pos : (0 : тДЭ) < n := by
    have : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА ^ 2 := by grind
    linarith [show (XтВА : тДЭ) ^ 2 тЙд n by exact_mod_cast hn]
  have hn_eq_x2 : (n : тДЭ) = x ^ 2 := (sq_sqrt hn_pos.le).symm
  -- Show that ╬╡ is small (╬╡ тЙд 1/11.4┬│)
  have hlog_ge_114 : log x тЙе 11.4 := by
    calc log x тЙе log XтВА := log_le_log (by grind : (0 : тДЭ) < XтВА) hx_ge
      _ тЙе 11.4 := log_XтВА_gt.le
  have h╬╡_small : ╬╡ тЙд 1 / 11.4 ^ 3 := by
    simp only [h╬╡_def]
    apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 1)
    ┬╖ apply pow_pos; linarith [log_XтВА_gt]
    ┬╖ apply pow_le_pow_leftтВА (by linarith : (0 : тДЭ) тЙд 11.4) hlog_ge_114
  have h1╬╡3_pos : 0 < (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by positivity
  have h1╬╡2_pos : 0 < (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by positivity
  have h1╬╡3_le_2 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд 2 := by
    have h1 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := by
      apply pow_le_pow_leftтВА (by linarith) (by linarith)
    calc (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙд (1 + 1 / 11.4 ^ 3) ^ 3 := h1
      _ тЙд 2 := by norm_num
  -- Define y_i = n / (1 + ╬╡)^(3-i), and show y_i тЙе XтВА
  have hyтВА_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе XтВА := by
    calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 = x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [hn_eq_x2]
      _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := by
          apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h1╬╡3_le_2
      _ тЙе XтВА ^ 2 / 2 := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (sq_le_sq' (by linarith) hx_ge); norm_num
      _ тЙе XтВА := by norm_num
  have h1╬╡2_le_1╬╡3 : (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙд (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ╬╡]
  have h1╬╡_le_1╬╡2 : 1 + ╬╡ тЙд (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ╬╡]
  have hyтВБ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВА_ge
    (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡2_pos h1╬╡2_le_1╬╡3)
  have hyтВВ_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе XтВА := le_trans hyтВБ_ge
    (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡_pos h1╬╡_le_1╬╡2)
  -- Apply Dusart to get primes
  obtain тЯиqтВА, hqтВА_prime, hqтВА_lb, hqтВА_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) hyтВА_ge
  obtain тЯиqтВБ, hqтВБ_prime, hqтВБ_lb, hqтВБ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) hyтВБ_ge
  obtain тЯиqтВВ, hqтВВ_prime, hqтВВ_lb, hqтВВ_ubтЯй := Dusart.proposition_5_4 (n / (1 + ╬╡)) hyтВВ_ge
  -- Show y_i тЙе x (needed for upper bound helper)
  have hx_ge_2 : x тЙе 2 := by linarith [hx_ge, (by grind : (2 : тДЭ) тЙд XтВА)]
  have hyтВА_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе x := by
    calc n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 = x ^ 2 / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 := by rw [hn_eq_x2]
      _ тЙе x ^ 2 / 2 := div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (sq_nonneg x) (by norm_num) h1╬╡3_le_2
      _ тЙе x := by rw [ge_iff_le, le_div_iffтВА (by norm_num : (0 : тДЭ) < 2)]; nlinarith
  have hyтВБ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 тЙе x := le_trans hyтВА_ge_x
    (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡2_pos h1╬╡2_le_1╬╡3)
  have hyтВВ_ge_x : n / (1 + ╬╡) тЙе x := le_trans hyтВБ_ge_x
    (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hn_pos.le h1╬╡_pos h1╬╡_le_1╬╡2)
  -- Upper bound helper: show q_i upper bound implies q_i тЙд next threshold
  have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy_pos : 0 < y) (hy_ge : y тЙе x) {q : тДХ}
      (hq : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x := log_le_log hx_pos hy_ge
    have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
      div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy_pos.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
        (rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
    calc (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hq
      _ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
      _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; field_simp; ring
  -- Get upper bounds
  have hqтВА_ub' : (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВА_ge_x hqтВА_ub
    calc (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
  have hqтВБ_ub' : (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВБ_ge_x hqтВБ_ub
    calc (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp; ring
  have hqтВВ_ub' : (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВВ_ge_x hqтВВ_ub
    calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n := by field_simp
  -- StrictMono: qтВА < qтВБ < qтВВ
  have hqтВА_lt_qтВБ : qтВА < qтВБ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВА_ub'.trans_lt hqтВБ_lb)
  have hqтВБ_lt_qтВВ : qтВБ < qтВВ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВБ_ub'.trans_lt hqтВВ_lb)
  -- qтВВ < n: the Dusart interval has upper bound yтВВ * (1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│) < yтВВ * (1 + ╬╡) = n
  have hqтВВ_lt_n : qтВВ < n := by
    have hyтВВ_lt_n : n / (1 + ╬╡) < n := by rw [div_lt_self_iff hn_pos]; linarith
    have hlog_yтВВ_gt : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := by
      apply log_lt_log hx_pos
      calc x < n / (1 + ╬╡) := lt_of_le_of_lt hyтВВ_ge_x hyтВВ_lt_n |>.trans_le le_rfl
    have hqтВВ_strict : (qтВВ : тДЭ) < n := by
      have hlog_yтВВ_pow_pos : 0 < (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := by positivity
      calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) + (n / (1 + ╬╡)) / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hqтВВ_ub
        _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by field_simp; ring
        _ < (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
          apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by positivity)
          gcongr
          apply pow_lt_pow_left hlog_yтВВ_gt.le hlog_pos.le (by norm_num)
        _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; field_simp; ring
        _ = n := by field_simp
    exact Nat.cast_lt.mp hqтВВ_strict
  refine тЯи![qтВА, qтВБ, qтВВ], fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption,
    Fin.strictMono_iff_lt_succ.mpr fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption, fun i тЖж ?_, hqтВВ_lt_nтЯй
  fin_cases i <;> simp only [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons,
    Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, h╬╡_def]
  ┬╖ simp only [Fin.val_zero, CharP.cast_eq_zero, sub_zero]
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 : тДЭ))
        = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ 3 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
      _ тЙд qтВА := hqтВА_lb.le
  ┬╖ simp only [Fin.val_one, Nat.cast_one]
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 1 : тДЭ))
        = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-2 : тДЭ) := by ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ 2 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
      _ тЙд qтВБ := hqтВБ_lb.le
  ┬╖ simp only [Fin.val_ofNat, Nat.reduceMod, Nat.cast_ofNat]
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 2 : тДЭ))
        = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-1 : тДЭ) := by ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_one]; field_simp
      _ тЙд qтВВ := hqтВВ_lb.le

blueprint_comment /--
\subsection{Bounding the factors in \eqref{eq:main-ineq}}
-/

have hyтВА_ge : n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3 тЙе XтВА := by

-- Upper bound helper: show q_i upper bound implies q_i тЙд next threshold
have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy_pos : 0 < y) (hy_ge : y тЙе x) {q : тДХ}
(hq : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
have hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x := log_le_log hx_pos hy_ge
have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy_pos.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
(rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
calc (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hq
_ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
- _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; field_simp; ring
+ _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; field_simp
-- Get upper bounds
have hqтВА_ub' : (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВА_ge_x hqтВА_ub
calc (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
- _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
+ _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by field_simp
have hqтВБ_ub' : (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВБ_ge_x hqтВБ_ub
calc (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
- _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp; ring
+ _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp
have hqтВВ_ub' : (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n := by
have := upper (by positivity) hyтВВ_ge_x hqтВВ_ub
calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
_ = n := by field_simp

  -- Upper bound helper: show q_i upper bound implies q_i тЙд next threshold
  have upper {y : тДЭ} (hy_pos : 0 < y) (hy_ge : y тЙе x) {q : тДХ}
      (hq : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ)) : (q : тДЭ) тЙд y * (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have hlog_ge : log y тЙе log x := log_le_log hx_pos hy_ge
    have h : y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) тЙд y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) :=
      div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hy_pos.le (rpow_pos_of_pos hlog_pos 3)
        (rpow_le_rpow hlog_pos.le hlog_ge (by grind))
    calc (q : тДЭ) тЙд y + y / (log y) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hq
      _ тЙд y + y / (log x) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := add_le_add_right h y
      _ = y * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def, тЖР rpow_natCast]; field_simp; ring_nf
  -- Get upper bounds
  have hqтВА_ub' : (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВА_ge_x hqтВА_ub
    calc (qтВА : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 3) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2 := by field_simp; ring
  have hqтВБ_ub' : (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВБ_ge_x hqтВБ_ub
    calc (qтВБ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡) ^ 2) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n / (1 + ╬╡) := by field_simp; ring
  have hqтВВ_ub' : (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n := by
    have := upper (by positivity) hyтВВ_ge_x hqтВВ_ub
    calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := this
      _ = n := by field_simp
  -- StrictMono: qтВА < qтВБ < qтВВ
  have hqтВА_lt_qтВБ : qтВА < qтВБ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВА_ub'.trans_lt hqтВБ_lb)
  have hqтВБ_lt_qтВВ : qтВБ < qтВВ := Nat.cast_lt.mp (hqтВБ_ub'.trans_lt hqтВВ_lb)
  -- qтВВ < n: the Dusart interval has upper bound yтВВ * (1 + 1/(log yтВВ)┬│) < yтВВ * (1 + ╬╡) = n
  have hqтВВ_lt_n : qтВВ < n := by
    have hyтВВ_lt_n : n / (1 + ╬╡) < n := by rw [div_lt_self_iff hn_pos]; linarith
    have hlog_yтВВ_gt : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := by
      apply log_lt_log hx_pos
      calc x < n / (1 + ╬╡) := lt_of_le_of_lt hyтВВ_ge_x hyтВВ_lt_n |>.trans_le le_rfl
    have hqтВВ_strict : (qтВВ : тДЭ) < n := by
      have hlog_yтВВ_pow_pos : 0 < (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := by positivity
      calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) + (n / (1 + ╬╡)) / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hqтВВ_ub
        _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by field_simp; ring
        _ < (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
          apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by positivity)
          gcongr
          apply pow_lt_pow_left hlog_yтВВ_gt.le hlog_pos.le (by norm_num)
        _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; field_simp; ring
        _ = n := by field_simp
    exact Nat.cast_lt.mp hqтВВ_strict
  refine тЯи![qтВА, qтВБ, qтВВ], fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption,
    Fin.strictMono_iff_lt_succ.mpr fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption, fun i тЖж ?_, hqтВВ_lt_nтЯй

  ┬╖ simp only [Fin.val_one, Nat.cast_one]
    calc (n : тДЭ) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-(3 - 1 : тДЭ))
        = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-2 : тДЭ) := by ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ 2 := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_natCast]; field_simp
      _ тЙд qтВБ := hqтВБ_lb.le
  ┬╖ simp only [Fin.val_ofNat, Nat.reduceMod, Nat.cast_ofNat]

        = n * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) ^ (-1 : тДЭ) := by ring_nf
      _ = n / (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by rw [rpow_neg h1╬╡_pos.le, rpow_one]; field_simp
      _ тЙд qтВВ := hqтВВ_lb.le

    have hyтВВ_lt_n : n / (1 + ╬╡) < n := div_lt_self hn_pos (by linarith)
    have hlog_yтВВ_pos : 0 < log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) := log_pos (by linarith : 1 < (n : тДЭ) / (1 + ╬╡))
    have hlog_yтВВ_gt : log (n / (1 + ╬╡)) > log x := log_lt_log hx_pos (lt_of_lt_of_le hyтВВ_lt_n le_rfl)
    have hqтВВ_strict : (qтВВ : тДЭ) < n := by
      calc (qтВВ : тДЭ) тЙд n / (1 + ╬╡) + (n / (1 + ╬╡)) / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ (3 : тДЭ) := hqтВВ_ub
        _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log (n / (1 + ╬╡))) ^ 3) := by field_simp
        _ < (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + 1 / (log x) ^ 3) := by
          apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ hyтВВ_pos
          gcongr
          exact pow_lt_pow_leftтВА hlog_yтВВ_gt.le hlog_pos.le (by norm_num)
        _ = (n / (1 + ╬╡)) * (1 + ╬╡) := by simp only [h╬╡_def]; field_simp
        _ = n := by field_simp
    exact Nat.cast_lt.mp hqтВВ_strict
  refine тЯи![qтВА, qтВБ, qтВВ], fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption,
    Fin.strictMono_iff_lt_succ.mpr fun i тЖж by fin_cases i <;> assumption, fun i тЖж ?_, hqтВВ_lt_nтЯй
  fin_cases i <;> simp only [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.head_cons,
    Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, h╬╡_def]

Analysis:
Let me analyze the conversation chronologically:

  1. Initial Request: User asked to read the project README file at /Users/eric/GitHub/PrimeNumberTheoremAnd/README.md. This is a Lean formalization project for the Prime Number Theorem.

  2. Main Task: User selected line 775 of PrimeNumberTheoremAnd/Lcm.lean containing exists_q_primes and asked to "clear the sorry for exists_q_primes on line 776".

    • The structure of exists_q_primes theorem
